summary: Full-Stack Developer & Contentful Certified Professional with 2+ years of professional client experience specializing in e-commerce storefronts, custom CMS theme development, and platform migrations across Shopify, HubSpot, and WordPress. Hands-on with local LLMs and prompt optimizations, with applied interest in AI/generative search readiness. Former culinary team leader with 9 years managing teams of 5–20, overseeing budgets and vendor relationships now applied to stakeholder communication and project management.

Developed Liquid templates, integrated Stripe payments, and owned client communication as sole developer.

Set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline with automated linting before deploying to production.
